name: Elk River Floats
description: Parent brand for the Noel-Pineville Elk River floats; operates the Wayside, Kozy Kamp, Eagles Nest and Trestle Park access/campgrounds. 6-mi and 12-mi trips.

name: Kozy Kamp (Elk River Floats)
description: Pineville-area (upper Elk) campground and rentals; RV/tent/hut sites plus offsite cabins.

name: Eagles Nest Camp & Canoe
description: Noel campground (Elk River Floats family); rafts 4-10 person, tubes; 6-mi and 12-mi trips.

name: Big Elk Floats and Camping
description: Family-run since 1989 at Pineville (Elk River & Big Sugar Creek); camping Mar-Oct.

name: River Ranch Resort
description: Largest Noel outfitter (45+ yrs); 5-mi & 8-mi floats, tube float, night float. Tent/RV/cabins/glamping, 6,000 sq ft store + dining. Accesses: Ranch and Sycamore Landing.

name: Shady Beach Campground
description: Quarter-mile private beach, zipline, vacation homes. Pineville->Shady Beach 8-mi (most popular); serves Big Sugar, Indian and Elk.

name: Two Sons Floats & Camping
description: Noel (lower Elk); 3-seat canoes, 6- & 8-man rafts, riverfront cabins, large beach.
